case_title: 691 O'FARRELL STREET LLC VS. DAVID KNAPP et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF 691 O'FARRELL STREET LLC
